Bonhamss Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration Of This Controversy
Off Calendar Dec-18-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Randall Morrison of RDM Law telephone number 510-778-1389 for Plaintiff Timothy Duran.
Gerard Rose of Law Office of Gerard Rose telephone number 831-277-8140 for Defendant Bonhams & Butterfields Auctioneers Corporation.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BONHAMS & BUTTERFIELDS AUCTIONEERS CORPORATION'S Motion To Compel Arbitration Of This Controversy is granted. Mediation is not a condition precedent to arbitration. Plaintiff fails to demonstrate that defendant waived the right to arbitrate. Waivers are "not to be lightly inferred and the party seeking to establish a waiver bears a heavy burden of proof." St. Agnes Med. Ctr. v. Pacificare of CA, (2003) 31 Cal.4th 1187, 1195. The court denies defendant's request for fees per CCP 128.5. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/EG)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-18-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Randall Morrison of RDM Law telephone number 510-778-1389 for Plaintiff Timothy Duran.
Gerard Rose of Law Office of Gerard Rose telephone number 831-277-8140 for Defendant Bonhams & Butterfields Auctioneers Corporation.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BONHAMS & BUTTERFIELDS AUCTIONEERS CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is off calendar as moot. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/EG)
